As expected, there wasn't much information on the current setting, but more on the history of this world. There was information about the kingdom I currently lived in, also known as Starz, and then there was the geography of the continent known as Hesha.

Other than that, there was no information on how that geography was divided. How many nations were there, or how many races lived on this continent? There was no information about that, even if I wanted to dig something up.

In the end, I could only give up and focus on what I could currently do.

Nothing.

As I said, there was no point in my doing mana cultivation as it wouldn't help. No power attributes of mine would change if I were to sit on my ass for years or repeat the motion of a sword swing for ten thousand years.

Currently, there were only two things I could do and they were to either have some dick action, or go out and hunt.

Sounds manly.

But those options were not available as well. I had already used one chance of mine, and the other chance would be for the night. And going out would require me to complete the town's training, which was tomorrow.

But after that, my plan was simple.

Grow.

So all I had to do was somehow spend the day, and despite my lustful nature, I decided to just sleep it out. I was woken up after about three hours when Martha came to wake me up for lunch.

After lunch, the siblings once again left for training, and I went upstairs to sleep. The next time I woke up was when Martha came to wake me up for dinner. Although I was wasting time, my family could understand since I had supposedly gone through a very tiring awakening ceremony.

If only they knew.

Anyway, after dinner, everyone left to sleep, and since it was around eight pm, there was still time before my cooldown ended, so I went to my room once again.

Finally, my laziness paid off as after about two hours, my cooldown was reset once again, and it was time for me to go down and have some fun.
